source_comments: Spent around 10 tickets and 60 quartz for her to come home.  I figured I might get lucky since the last 5\* i pulled was space ishtar but I expected to spend alot more than that.  My coffers are now pretty full for summer kiara.
I have 238 quartz, 110 fragments, and 20 tickets.  Sound be around 540 and 40 tickets by the time I start rolling.

Best: Did 1 multi in summer 1 banner 1 for CEs while I waited for banner 2 and got NP 2 tama lancer.  Also getting Junao on the GSSR right after his banner so I saved myself from the GSSR hell waver put me through.

Worst: 1000 sq for summer nero and ending up with NP5 nobu and no nero. 800 sq for Jalter and having nothing to show for that.

I have never rolled for Scathach but decided to do a 10 shot on her day + reines to test my luck before saving for castoria.  Did a 10 shot and she showed up on the first card.  She finally takes the throne on my account as the easiest 5\* I have ever gotten (beating MHX who came home in 3 tickets).   This also means i have all the current 5\* lancers in the game since they always spook me and i decided I was never going to go hard rolling for her.

I remeber being 14 and learning that i could actually buy red bull by watching Superbad.  I thought the same and figured you had to be 21 to buy them and was totally shocked when Jonah just walked into a store and bought one
Conq slam it then use harvest randomize influence

You didnt actually mirror maps you used a faceted fossil to crate mirror copies.  Those cost like 2 ex each when this was meta and it always gave profit.  You took a map like burial chambers(with elder influence but not inhabited by a boss), synth crafted one untill you synthesized nemesis, harvest crafted does not consume sextants, and gave it 100 deli (scarabs, currency, or breach).  Then you use a faceted fossil to copy the base and run it with beyond and nemesis 3/4 sextants and scarabs.  These gave like 5-6 ex per map and were what a lot of people considered endgame until they nerfed it after ritual.

AR 56 and i have no favonius lance.  I cant use any energy recharge polearm usersers because It will not come home.  I literally have 2 copies of WGS from standard and weapons banner(it was not on rate up) and have not gotten a copy of it.

Decided to go hard for Staff of Homa instead of c1 Hu Tau cause its probably going to be bis for most future 5* polearm users.  Unfortunetly I had to max out my fate path to get it and got a second copy of WGS and Elegy along the way.  Im happy with my pulls cause having a WGS for each abyss team would be huge and Elegy is a much better weapon for venti than my amos bow.  Im praying for C1 Hu Tao but seing as im only 24 into pity, will only be able to get it to 40 ish by the time the banner ends, and it will be a 50/50 it is not looking good.

I also went from 12m mora to 7m leveling 3 weapons and ascending hu/xingqiu and leveling their talents.  Ill probably be at 1m by the time theyre done and have about a month of talent farming before i can grind xings artifacts.
"Batman: Foundation"

I think flats have more use outside of smoking brisket.  Like if someone was making a brisket for a jewish holiday or something and cooking it in the oven, the point would not cook well at all but a flat would be fine.
Every once and a while ill be doing my eula ult combo and ill either click to fast or hold down my mouse button and she will just stop dpsing and waste 1/3rd of her ult going into her charged attack.

Got my space ishtar to a decent np level and she has carried me through the entire event so far.  Had so much fun using her that im at 92/100 missions and other than the rare lancer node I've been able to get through the whole event with space ishtar and regular ishtar.  Spent way to many apples though when I really need to be saving them for christmas.    


Had a lot of fun in this event and I really grew to like space ishtar as a character.  When i started playing the game I decided to grail all rin faces to 100 but when SWII released I thought I was going to skip her.  Since she is insane with Castoria I decided to pull and she ended up being my favorite rin face so far.  MHX also earned some love even though she keeps taking my GSSR rolls.  


Now im just farming the egg node untill I finish out the event shop then im either farming xp or going back to egg hell.  I need 67 eggs by the time castoria comes around and I only have like 10 so finishing the event so early helps me out a little bit.

Had around 240 quartz and 20 tickets and the NP 2 dream.  My first 10 shot got me a shez spook and 3 four star servants so I was off to a good start but NP 2 seemed like it wasnt going to happen.  At around half my qz left I got space ishtar and NP 3 calamity jane.  I spent all my quartz and decided to buy a 80 pack.  Half way through that I got a junako spook and at the very end of my roll i got NP2 space ishtar.  Its insane with how bad my luck was over arujna alter banner and summer i managed to pull 4 five stars in about 480 qaurtz.    
[https://imgur.com/a/O6b6Vxb](https://imgur.com/a/O6b6Vxb)

The worst I ever had was one time I went back home over summer and my roommate gave me his cat to take home because out next house didnt allow pets.  So I have to take him out of his carrier to go through the metal detector and when i do he is covered in his urine.  I make a comment to my sister about it and the guy on the otherside of the detector just snaps his head to me and flags me for the swab the second i make it through.  Urine has some of the chemicals in it so i set it off and they barley give me enough time to put the cat in the carrier before they take me into another room.  15 minutes later ive been thuroughly searched, my cat is freaking out, and i can finally wash the urine off my hands.  I was so fucking pissed it was rediculous

Mine has been Eula since i got her.  Have her team pretty min max with zhongli/raiden/bennet (want to switch bennet with rosaria eventually).  I recently got WGS too so her AAs went from 5k normals with 12k crits to like 8k normals and 25k crits.  Her ult also slaps for like 250k avg and my highest one was about 420k so shes been an absolute monster
Im sitting on 2 vessels currently and havent gotten enough koi to even buy my first copy of the weapon...

Managed to get C1 Raiden and am about 25 into pity on the limited banner.  I was close to my standard pity and decided to ascend some characters to get more blue fates, and on my last one i finally got a copy of WGS.  My main dps is Eula and i was using serpents spine so im way more hyped for the WGS, but if i manage C2 Raiden my Eula team will be perfect.

Baby bowser in yoshis island.  I spent probably 2+ months trying to beat it and failed every time.  One day my parents were driving me somewhere and i popped on my gameboy and finally managed to beat him.  But.... i saw a friend do it and knew you had to turn off the game after the credits, so i turned off my game but did it to early.  I opened my game to find out it never saved my progress and i never beat him.  Was so pissed i threw the game in the trash
He was.  The Vanessa stuff happened around 1000 years ago but Venti ascended to godhood around 2000. Vanessas rebellion was against the Lawrence clan but Ventis was against the old anemo archon

I watched all of dragon ball z but didnt really think of it as an anime at the time.

The one i would say was my real first was Code Geass and that show instantly made me an anime fan.

Im going in with 90qz for musashi but im fine with just getting some CEs while i wait for the 2nd banner.  Then i got 240qz and the monthly tickets for melt/bunny.  Fingers crossed for atleast one so i can save for castoria and summer kiara next year

I got godjuna and an NP upgrade would be nice so i can just bond grail him and my merlin and never have to switch my comp for the rest of the game without having NP2.

I also got MHX so some form of NP battery would be nice for skadi looping ST fights (but i think all her skills have already gotten a buff so i dont know how it would be possible)

Spent 400 sq trying for godjuna and ended up getting spooked by normal arjuna at the end of it so I gave up hope.  I have way more cavalry than knights but the chance at godjuna/kama was to good to pass up.  I closed my eyes so i couldnt see if i got a loading screen and got a gold assassin on my second card which np2 MHX.  This was followed by a gold breserker card which got my hopes up for godjuna but was atlante alter.  2nd to last summon I got rainbow sparks, into a berserker, and finally got godjuna!  Been a day one player and this is the second time i got my target on the GSSR(first was gramps on the assassin only), and i cant believe i got him out of such a large pool.  This was also my second double ssr suring the gssr but was much better than my seigfried/iskander pull.

Today me and my friend were in a ufo and fighting a team in the spire crater, and he told me to jump out cause we were over water and i would be fine.  so i jump out and manage to hit the only rock in the middle of the lake and felt like an idiot for the rest of the day

Been playing on/off again since launch.  Im ar 53 and have a lv 90 keqing, venti, and zhongli.  My lv 80 5\* is jean.  I would like people to do events with, like this event where you cannot matchmake and find more people for the teapot/traveling salesman.
I think someone said in s3 that he had a metal plate in his head so that would be why the bullet ricocheted off but your point still makes sense
True pain is trying to heal yourself with the AF passive but having too much shield to actually take damage

I would say beyond is the best for making currency.  It spawns in a ton of rare monsters so if you are running maps like burials it just gives you more chances at good drops and The Doctor card.  It also helps give you more drops in Nemesis 3 maps where you make back the 5c in chaos drops alone.  That being said it might not be great if your not juicing your maps because more monsters = more beyond spawns so if your alch and going it might not give the same value.

Havent farmed it yet this leauge but i played a HH cyclone in legion, so the best advise i have if everything is still similar is to run shackles/koams roots with a curse effect enchated helmed to give you self temp chains.  This gives your stolen mods like double the duration and helps you stack like 80 of them.
Then a lot of the mods give you ele damage so doing by stacking ele dmg you get some insane scalling.  running beyond on the map device also helps cause it adds a ton of free buffs

look up the combustion rotation because almost all of your damage happens during combust so if you mess that up your numbers are not going to be good.  Fire mage is also kind of gear dependant so until you hit 60 it is not going to be very strong (i still use it over frost/arcane for leveling though)

Yeah i made a DH to have a toon that can have a lot of movement when clearing old raids.  But i realized that any time i actually saved was negated by how fast my mage could get there in the first place
This was me after i started playing again in 8.3 and ended up leveling and gearing 3 different mages (on three different servers).  I probably farmed mechagon 60-70 times trying to get the bracers
I am AR49 right now and just like you i have gotten a total of 1 ring of boreas for my keqing after like 8 weeks or so.

Someone made a bomb threat in one of our bathrooms and the school evacuated everyone for around 7 hours.  While police showed up and searched the school everyone just sat out side and it was really really boring.  I dont think anyone got caught for that though.
The next was apparently two students had beef so one grabed a lead pipe and just walked into the others classroom and smacked him in the head with it.  I only knew cause my class at the time faced the window the cops/ambulence showed up and everyone wondered what was going on.

One time we went to church and the main cathedral was full so we went to the service offered in the gym of the catholic school behind it.  Its kind of what you would expect no pews just a bunch of metal chairs laid out, so me and my family pick our seats and the service starts.  About half way through the singing they do at the begining of mass there is a lul in the chorus and everyone gets quiet, right in time for my little sister to let out a massive fart.  and this shit was LOUD.  Like the sound bounced off the metal chair and echoed in the gym for a solid 6 second.  Everyone in the gym was looking right at us and my older sister my dad and i were dying untill my sister and i realized people probably thought it was one of us.  dad never stoped laughing though.  The priest and chorus also completely stoped singing and i think he made a joke about it before moving on.  Thank god my mom grabed my little sister by the arm and took her to the bathroom so everyone had a pretty good idea i didnt do it.
I have the opposite problem.  I wanted the TS set and ended up getting insane TF pieces so i called it a day with that.

RNG man.  I wanted a 4 set TS set and ended up getting enough insane TF peices that i decided to go 2 TF 2 Glad.  Not to mention im waiting on a TS electro goblet and have gotten 2 TF ones (trash substats though)

At AR40 you really only want to farm the weapon ascension mats for AR50 and farm leylines.  I did this and had around 10m mora when i hit 45.  Character mats, Artifacts, and Talent books all get a drop buff at AR45 so you would want to hold off farming them untill you get there

Having Zhongli with 1.8k attack (level 80 with level 80 vortex vanquisher) its still pretty true.  I did my dailes today and slapped an abyss mage for like 20 seconds and got him to 50% hp.  Then swapped to keqing and took the rest of the 50% off in like 5 seconds.  He is not a good main dps but i still think hes really fun to play.  I mainly wanted him to be a venti like support for bosses and it seems like for that role hes really good which is all i wanted.  I also dont have artifacts so maybe that will change when i do.

Had enough saved and managed my pity so I had a 100% chance of getting Zhongli.  By the time he came around I had 1600 gems left and decided to do 5 pulls on the weapon banner to hope his spear would come home too.  Turns out 5 was generous and i got the spear in 2 pulls.  So far the luckiest i have been in this game and am so hyped cause my only other spear was the pyro dmg one!

This is my second week doing the wolf boss at AR 45 trying to get the ring of boreas (week 7 of not having one drop) and i noticed that i only got 1 talent ascension mat instead of two.  Does anyone know if the 2 per week at ar45 isnt garunteed?  I also got a prototype during this but i got one from davalin last week and 2 ascension mats so i dont think they share a drop chance.
Mondstadt for the personal WP then im going liyue to get the wings for Zhong-li.

Its sad that the most reliable method for me to kill him is to just keqing charge attack since swapping characters just sends me to the ground and i miss out on a dps phase.  hes not hard if you just charge attack with your main dps but this means the fight is not fun at all which is a different problem

After 90 pulls you are garunteed a 5*, which has a 50% chance to be the rate up 5* in the limited banner.   If you do not get the rate up 5* after another 90 pulls you have a 100% chance of getting the rate up.  All seperate banners (limited/weapon/standard) have their own pity that rolls over to the next banner.

I mean you did ask but his point still remains.  If you want to level 1 char from 60-70 it costs 60 purple books and 70-80 costs 80 books.  If you dont save them for 1 or 2 characters and have them ready to go when you reach the next WL it will take somewhere around 8 days of spensing resin on just XP leylines to level them up.  
You can play the game how you want but if you dont do this instead of leveling chars fast you will need to take weeks farming XP, which means you cant farm ascention mats/weapon mats and you wont be able to do content.  If you want to level characters fast the only way is to spend resin on the leyline which unfortunetly means you need money or time.

Your better off saving your resin on artifacts till AR45.  farming them for purples (especial at AR35) means you only get 1-2 and the stats will probably be trash.  But at 45 your garunteed 1 gold, possibly 2 and a lot of purples that might have good stats.

Im about $20 in the hole with the monthly thing and i bought the 15 pack.  Im about 50 summons in the hole for the general so im probably going to buy the $50 pack and hope i dont get another weapon.  Im also going to buy the $100 dollar pack when zhongli gets released.  Since ive played this game like 6 hours every day for the last week im totaly fine with spending at least 60 which is what a game costs now a day, especialy with the first time double purchase

yeah hes saying there should be more to do at AR40 than doing sub optimal grinds.  At AR45 you get 1 5* artifact every time and a chance at 2 where your chance at a 5* at 40 is about 25%-33% so its just not worth the resin compared to ascension mats/exp

I have gotten 300 chests in mondstadt and 600 in liyue, done all the quests, and have done every time trial/seelie and am only 1k into AR 33.  I have only been playing for a week though so i missed like 10 days of commison xp but i am also completely out of things to do.  I spend like 5 hours a day running around and am lucky to find 30 chests

Just wanted to reply that my above comment is wrong.  The sword has the same effect as the claymore so its not the same as the crafted sword and offers a flat 20% attack buff on top of the heal.  That means aquila is pretty insane and causes my Jean to be a dps carry.  Like she does almost as much dmg as my fishl who has way better artifacts.  Still would not chose it over a character though.

If i remember correctly his ult also summons those pillars used to seal off the 5* artifact boss (which you also coincidentaly get the stones to unlock said pillars from turning geoculus into the shrine)
yeah its reset back to 90 but if you pull a non rate up 5* your next 5* character is garunteed to be the rate up so if you want to try your luck the next gold you see will be venti

I got the favonius 5* sword from the general banner and while the effect is insane, i dont think i would chose it over a 5* character.  The only difference between the liyue crafted 4* sword and the 5* is that the 5* heals you but the increased ascension mat costs and the fact that the 4* can be enhanced much easier to increase its AoE dmg makes me think that you would be better off saving or rolling on the general for different 5*s.
Unless you want to whale for constellation 2 venti (3 copies) i wouldnt really waste the gems on him and just save or try for qiqi and keqing

As someone that has played FGO for about 3 years now i feel that most of the problems people have with the resin system stem from the fact that we only have 2 continents and havent had any real events.  Leveling your first team in a gacha is painful but in like 2-3 months everyone will have 40+ resin boosts and able to farm mats much easier than we can now.  

weapon and character xp is a different story though and they need to add more systems to help people level their shit.

Saw mysts thumbnail on my channel and decided to do a 10 shot after basically skipping the whole event.   I expected nothing but gil decided he wanted to be the second servant to show up [twice in one of my 10 shots](https://imgur.com/NBxFrOs).  Im also happy that he showed up right after my ishtar got to bond 10 so hes about to be put to work.

Ive had 7 CE drops this event which is pretty insane considering all of them dropped during the first two days of event grinding.  The first two were summer painting, then 2 foxy ladys, 2 summer shines, and then another foxy lady.  This was awsome cause i MLBd foxy lady on day 2, got alot of skadi FP, and i didnt lose any bonus!

My favorite CE is a tie between we never summon and the teaching CE.  >!Love the lewdness of teaching ce combined with the wholesomeness of the content, but the fact that 2/3 of my favorite chars were in summon made that stand slightly above.  Also watching kiyo, mama, and eresh ship themselves in the dialouge was hilarious.!<

BB is the number 2 servant of the year for me but rolling for nero/raikou/jeanne left me at 150qz and 2 tickets.  Gave up on Jeane after getting a drake spook so ill have to hope i get EX rank luck.

If i end up with MHX though ill be hyped but if i get nothing i might do an 80 pack on mhxx solo rate up.

Edit:  Got MHX in my first 10 shot and medb in my last.  Thats good enough to not end up rage pulling but i might go for more during Mhxx solo rate up.  Did 14 more summons and NP2 both the 4 stars, so ill probably call it there and wait till next year.

Edit 2:  Got my log in ticket today and SHE ACTUALLY CAME HOME!  I cant believe a yolo ticket did it but Im so happy i dont have to wait a year and can save for ruler artoria!
I've been there all week and ive seen less people wearing masks there than I have in the last 4 months of living in Arizona.  Its pretty rediculous.
Thanks, >! didnt realize her FA move set was different from the ones we got on day 1 of the event so i didnt think that was necessary.!<

Heres the Skadi looping tier list. [https://gamepress.gg/grandorder/skadi-looping-tier-list](https://gamepress.gg/grandorder/skadi-looping-tier-list)

Rider ishtar on the other hand is pretty much useless for skadi looping w/o a waver.

I would also recommend 10/10/10ing your skadi and 10/-/10ing valk to make sure you hit the thresholds cause im pretty sure the guide assumes all the mentioned skills are maxed

Hoping i will stop at that but after this banner im pretty much done rolling till Sin/ Arjuna alter.

Every silver card that upgrades to gold is double sided (A silver caster card only shows the caster graphic on one side but a silver card that gets upgraded to gold will show the caster graphic on both sides)

So if you want to lose your mind before the sparks just look at the back of the card!

been sitting on 800 mil since after the christmas lottos and thought that it would be enough.  after having a pretty good aniv and 10/10/10ing my gssr/skadi + patching up other random skills i went from 800 mill to 400 mil in like 2 days.  so the answer is you can never have enough but i would consider 600 mil to be pretty safe

I mean obviously but NP1 musashi (probably the best st saber unless im mistaken) does only 300 more np dmg than my artoria when they are only self buffed(from np dmg calculator).  That difference gets a little bigger with double merlin buffs but i dont think its big enough to warrent dropping a potential 400qz on a saber banner.

For me it would be most of the 5* sabers like Okita, saber shiki, or Altera.  I have NP3 artoria so she probably hits harder than most np1 st sabers would and no other aoe saber will do as much dmg as her. Just finished farming soaps for my skadi so now its time to farm the 100+ chains my king hassan needs.  Ill have 500 mill qp after 10/10/10 ing both of them and am fine on xp so i can skip the dailies and just focus on getting out of the various mat hells i find myself in.

probably mama, farmed about 400 boxes from christmas and davinchi and she ended up on about half my 3 turn teams for christmas and farmed all 200 boxes in davinchi by herself. so it took me about a month to get her from bond 5 to 10

A little.  Ive pretty much been dantes/ double skading everything since she dropped.  Its nice to not have to plug suit out waver for merlin and farm a node with about half the total button presses that my buster set up required

From what ive heard NP2 is the sweet spot for being able to handle all farming quests and NP3+ is just a luxury for being able to stomp challenge quests in 3 turns.  NP1 should be fine for most content minus breserkers (who need 5 overkill hits to hit 47%)  and either assassins or riders.

Also im pretty sure that a lv 100 gold foued np1 dantes is not that much worse than an NP2 though there is still a pretty big difference.  I think Zerkerlot is who needs to be NP3 to loop effectively.

dantes attack up and np gain skills are at 10, a FL skadi with 10/10/10 and my skadi at 8/5/10.  He easily gets refunded on wave 1 and 2 but only does about 90k to the boss

I also use a level 100 superscope so he might only be hitting the thresholds because of the extra 2k attack
Cant wait till he gets his NP up in about a week cause my NP1 dantes is barley able to clear the last wave in the soap node

Cinders definetly makes everything harder (iudex goes from like 1k hp to around 4-6k and starts the fight in his corrupted state) and this hp increase is static across all bosses.  So for example aldritch goes from 4k hp to 16k hp.  If its your first playthrough definetly try the vanilla version because starting your first playthrough on what is basically hard mode is a quick way to never want to play the game again.  That being said cinders does offer alot of more options and playability so once you make it through most of the game and are confident in your ability id definetly recommend switching.  If you want to do a spell caster build save it for cinders because there are so many QoL improvements that the base game just doesnt have.  The progression path also changes, so in the base game you start at cemetary of ash but in Cinders you have the options of starting from firelink, high wall, and undead settlement.

This isnt totally on topic but ill share it anyway.  In middle school i had the biggest crush on a girl in my school starting in 5th grade but i thought she was out of my leauge and i was way to scared to approach and talk to her (she was cheerleading captain and way more attractive than me).  I didnt say a word to her untill 8th grade when she sat next to me in english class and we had to work on some pointless coloring assignment.  So i just decided to fuck with her the whole time and after we spent the whole class laughing and fucking around I was so happy with myself and thought that maybe a couple more days like that and i might have a chance with her.  Luckily she had other ideas and asked her friend for my number after class so she could text me.  If she hadnt taken the initive i probably would have never worked up the courage to try and progress things.  But it also make me think that if i didnt wait for it to play out like that it might have never happened.

I keep a docs case in my alpha but ill probably start using the other two slots for a cms.   It just sucks that i cant buy them from therepist at my level and the cms costs the same as a survival kit on the flea marlet, which i could fit if i had a gamma and get 3x the value out of it.  Its totally on me for not doing that in the first place, i just thought it highlighted a good example of the type of situations prepared newer players get to survive where they wouldnt if they only had an alpha.

The way I look at it is the other day i killed a 3 man squad on interchange.  They were all fully geared with about 1-1.5 mill in loot.  So i loot them all, go on my way to extract, realize i forgot to grab his body armor so i go back and a rat ambushes me.  I kill him but my stomach, left leg, and arm are blacked out.  If i had a gamma i would have a survival kit in there (a max survival kit 15/15 costs the same as a 5/5 CMS) so i could have healed to full and extracted.  But instead i cant loot any meds cause everyone keeps them in their gamma and i die to exhaustion on my way to extract.  

as a new player this happens ALL THE TIME.  I know i misplayed and let the rat get the jump on me but not having a gamma makes me have to risk 40k extra every raid in a cms or survival kit and other heals.  Since im still learning i dont have the experince or money to put that much investment into all my raids so the fact that i would have been about 3.5-4 mill richer yesterday if i had more secure space is kind of huge.

Think of it this way, your team and the enemy team each have 30 motes.  You make it back first, bank 5 motes, and summon a small blocker.  while the other team has to kill that your team depoits the rest of the motes and now the enemy has to deal with 2-3 blockers.  Since 30 were deposited someone can invade and potentaly kill everyone and make the score effectivly 30-0, which basically wins you the round.  

Now if YOU made it back first and only banked 3 motes, you give the enemy team a chance to summon the blockers first and get the first invade while you deal with them. The above situation now happen to your team and you could have cost your team the round.  You are drastically putting any team you are on at a disadvanatge because you dont have the patience to wait and grab 2 more motes

The way the glitch seems to work for me, has happened multiple times too, is every time i relog the game my first kill converts all the exp i earned in my last online session by the 500% bonus exp mayhem gives you offline.  If you redeemed all these tokens in incriments of 1 then im sorry and your the first person this has happened to, but if ever randomly had 60 + tokens to redeem at once this glitch is what happened

The game gave you 57 Ranks you didnt earn and you redeemed them.  Its not like it took 57 guardian ranks away from you so you got all the stat bonuses from them and now its making you earn them back.  The glitch sucks (for me it happens every time i exit the game, relaunch, and then kill a boss) but you arent lossing progress you just traded the gradual stat progression for all of the stats upfront

Yeah but if you pair the Mirv hex with the shield instead of hp class mod and use the 1hp/100% more shield artifact  you can sit at like 40k shield and use vampyre to keep you at full hp all the time and regen nades

Immortal Moze is pretty fun for me right now.  For this you need to be lv 50 and at end game but with Vampyre skill (20% hp per enemy hit with grenade), Thin red line (60% hp reserved as extra shield), the transformer (100% shock immunity), the gain shield instead of hp class mod, and the 1 HP/100% extra shield artifact you can sit at around 45-55k shield and you can solo a 4 man circle of slaughter round sitting at full hp.  Use this with the Mirv Hex grenade mod and you can have at least 7 grenades out (21 when it splits) constantly dealing damage and regenerating shield while you are out regenerating all damage and taking full flakker shots to the face.

The Mirv Hex and Recurring Hex are alot better for this build.  It splits off into 3 projectiles (6 if you have recurring) that home on targets so you dont even have to aim them and each beam the projectiles creates probably get about 50 hits on what its dealing damage to.  This means each of the 50 hits (with all 3 beams its more like 150 hits) give you 20% of your sheild back and count in the grenade respawn chance so i can have 1 grenade and by the end of it have my full 16 back.  Combine this with 60-80k sheild and other than the occasional 1 shot you are completely immortal and deal insane damage to every mob on the map.

1 ) All quests reset so you will need to do side quests again

2)Fog of war stays uncovered based on your first play through so everything minus fast travel stations carry with you on tvhm

3) All bonus objectives transfer with you in tvhm so you dont need to rediscover every claptrap part, but this also means all the typhon chests you unlocked on your first play through will be empty on your second play through.  You also keep all the artifacts so instead of going back to every zone at lv 30-35 to uncover the eridian writings you can just get them as you progress in tvhm.
I see....  I... was born for this moment. -Meruem (HxH)

The difference between a general election debate and a primary debate are pretty substantial.  Trump was able to win the primary debates because he could rile up the audience and use them to his advantage when he was hard pressed for answers, and he was constantly able to deflect based on the amount of people that were in the initial primaries.  This entire factor, the reason Trump did so well, is going to be almost entirely removed so now he has to focus on his message and policies.  Going after Hillary wont cause the audience to cheer until the moderators have to move on because of time constraints, and if he goes off topic he will immediatly be called out on it.  A lot of Trumps strengths will be void during the GE debates and it will be left to who has a stronger understanding of their policies.  In that scenario i cant imagine that Trump will be able to contend against Hillary who has had twenty plus years of political experience and eight years after her previous run to develop her policies.  That being said Trump has surprised us before.
{Katanagatari}

I agree that adding content to this poem will do it justice.  If only our reality could reflect the happiness we create in our minds, the earth would be a better place.  The flow and rhymes were on point.  Great work!

The self reflection in this piece is on point, and i like that regardless of how you feel you recognize that there is happiness in family.  There is nothing but happiness in watching the next generation inherit the earth and evolve past the same struggles that we face today.

Thank you!  This is honestly my first attempt at creating poetry and actually really enjoy it as a medium for my thoughts.  Im glad to know that others feel the same way about this that i do and appreciate the feedback.
Such a powerful poem despite it being so small.  Deafening silence, while an oxymoron, is a reality and the subtlety of this poem complements it perfectly.

This entire poem resonated with me, especially the second and last stanza which reflects similar struggles that i have in facing my inner demons.  I would love to see your other works as well as any developments made on this peice

I have a Ipv 3 box mod with a dark horse RDA and i ran into the exact same problems with it that you did. Regardless of what i build the flavor of my juice always seemed muted and running parallels/ differently twisted wires didnt fix it.  Once i started building Zipper coils i was finally able to achieve the flavor i wanted with the clouds i wanted too.  I run my dual zipper coils at 150w so i would advise having a device that is capable of pushing that.  Of course you will need a RDA with post holes capable of fitting parallel coils, but vaping is a whole different experience for me with the zippers on my box mod.

As someone who has dumped 35 mill on skulls before getting a chance to seriously upgrade any of the new towers that are unlocked when you go to TH8, im looking forward to seeing how this base holds up with extremely low defenses (thankfully all my WT are at TH7 level so splash isnt that bad)  but i will update when i finally get some defense logs because im ridding out my shields since ive been upgrading all 4 barracks at the same time during our clans war break.  So any other early TH8's out there wondering how viable this base with low level defenses will hopefully be able to come to a conclusion when i follow this up

Keep the bases coming and dont stop posting because of all the down votes,  this post is a gem and you sir are a god walking amongst mere mortals

At TH7 you can easily 3 star mutiple TH8s that would give you 2k DE + per war with level 2 drags, max loons in CC, and max rage spells but for that i would recommend finding a 45+ person war clan.  This is so you have multiple targets to choose from and chances are you will have access to alot better troops for war if you are in a bigger clan.  if you are considering transfering look on the side bar for the clash recruitment forum on reddit and you will find a clan in no time.  I also got my BK to level 5 at TH7 and for the first two levels DE seemed so rare but since then im getting DE without even trying just barching/lighting storages and have had to gem my BK upgrade time so people dont steal my DE because there is always a day left when i have enough DE to upgrade again.(BK is level 8 and i have the DE for lv 9 after 12 days at TH8)

The best advise i can give you is to throw you TH out side you base (losing 7-12 trophies for a free shield is better than getting your base stomped) and look at http://clashofclansbuilder.com/ or browse reddit to find a base set up that protects your storages and not collectors and you should never have problems with people stealing your loot and trophies again.  While putting your th on the outside might seem sketch when i did it i wished i had done it sooner because it made the game that much easier

I was able to get my BK to lv 5 at TH7, and the way i did that was i pushed to gold 3 and constantly built lightning spells (kill me i know) and kept an eye out for full drills.  i used this website to learn the difference in between drill levels which can seriously help out if you happen to find level 5 or 6 drills full on the edge of a th, and sometimes can get 3.6k de just from drills http://clashofclans.wikia.com/wiki/Dark_Elixir_Drill.  But as of right now i would build up your new towers, get all you walls to pink for slight intimidation (TH8's can still roll through a TH7 base no matter what).  In order to keep my DE i just stayed online when i was close to a BK upgrade untill a builder freed up and i got the right amount of DE
Yeah it doesnt take much for a few archers to break into the core and tap on my DE storage, hence why i was looking for new base layouts!

how so? the amount ive been farming has allowed me to build the walls while also keeping builders down 24/7 doing essential upgrades like BK, lab, my DE drills (didnt start the drill in th7 because i moved to th8 shortly after the update), and all my new towers and storages.  However after some decent progress on skulls and when i build all my new towers up i will start saving and spending the big bucks on my defences.
I usually farm at about 1400-1600 and can find collector raids about every 10 nexts, while finding occasional 3k+ drill raids

After about 7 days my BK is currently upgrading to lv 8 and im debating if drags are more beneficial to upgrade than the barbarian first (i barch all day long but i want the added power in war).  My new defenses are low but can easily be dealt with after i stop spacing out builder time to grind walls.  Looking for advise on which towers to build up first as well as a different base layouts that have worked for you all in the past
